name: TON Trading Bot
description: Atomic TON trading tools: market data, portfolio, risk validation, simulation, DEX swap execution, cross-DEX arbitrage, sniper trading, copy trading, liquidity pools, farming, backtesting, risk management, and automation.

tools.name: ton_trading_get_market_data
tools.description: Fetch current TON price and DEX swap quotes for a token pair

tools.name: ton_trading_get_portfolio
tools.description: Get wallet balance, jetton holdings, and recent trade history

tools.name: ton_trading_validate_trade
tools.description: Check risk parameters before a trade (balance, max trade %, minimum balance)

tools.name: ton_trading_simulate_trade
tools.description: Paper-trade a swap using the virtual simulation balance (no real funds)

tools.name: ton_trading_execute_swap
tools.description: Execute a real DEX swap (STON.fi / DeDust) from the agent wallet — DM only

tools.name: ton_trading_record_trade
tools.description: Close an open trade in the journal and record final PnL

tools.name: ton_trading_get_arbitrage_opportunities
tools.description: Find cross-DEX price differences for a token pair across StonFi, DeDust, TONCO, and swap.coffee

tools.name: ton_trading_get_token_listings
tools.description: Fetch recently listed tokens on TON DEXes for sniper trading strategies

tools.name: ton_trading_get_token_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific token: price, market cap, holders, volume

tools.name: ton_trading_validate_token
tools.description: Safety-check a token before sniping: liquidity, volume, and rug-pull risk signals

tools.name: ton_trading_get_top_traders
tools.description: Find top-performing trader wallets on TON ranked by win rate and volume

tools.name: ton_trading_get_trader_performance
tools.description: Analyse the on-chain trading performance of a specific wallet for copy trading

tools.name: ton_trading_get_active_pools
tools.description: List active liquidity pools on TON DEXes sorted by 24-h volume

tools.name: ton_trading_get_farms_with_apy
tools.description: List yield farming opportunities on TON DEXes with estimated APY

tools.name: ton_trading_get_pool_volume
tools.description: Get detailed volume statistics for a specific liquidity pool

tools.name: ton_trading_backtest
tools.description: Replay a strategy against trade journal history and return win rate, PnL, and Sharpe ratio

tools.name: ton_trading_calculate_risk_metrics
tools.description: Calculate VaR, max drawdown, Sharpe ratio, and win/loss statistics from trade history

tools.name: ton_trading_set_stop_loss
tools.description: Register a stop-loss and optional take-profit rule for an open trade

tools.name: ton_trading_check_stop_loss
tools.description: Query active stop-loss and take-profit rules and detect which ones are triggered by the current market price

tools.name: ton_trading_get_optimal_position_size
tools.description: Calculate optimal position size using Kelly Criterion and fixed-fraction methods

tools.name: ton_trading_schedule_trade
tools.description: Store a pending trade for future execution at a specified datetime

tools.name: ton_trading_get_scheduled_trades
tools.description: List pending scheduled trades and flag which ones are due for execution

tools.name: ton_trading_reset_simulation_balance
tools.description: Reset the simulation balance to a starting amount for a fresh paper-trading session

tools.name: ton_trading_set_simulation_balance
tools.description: Manually set the simulation balance to a specific amount to align with real portfolio
